risk_tier: Tier 0 plus focused RepoX and manifest parse/schema checks
required_after_apply: focused RepoX or canonical focused CTest RepoX if available
validate example required fields against the moved schema or an equivalent structural check
git ls-files ide must return no tracked files
rg -n "ide/manifests|projection_manifest.schema.json" must show only allowed generated-output references, historical evidence, or updated contract paths
escalation_conditions: Run CMake configure or projection regeneration only if the apply task also changes generated manifest output paths in CMake/scripts.
Run portable projection or internal pilot validators only if projection/release staging inputs are changed beyond documentation and tracked source contract paths.
generated_output_policy: No .dominium.local, .aide.local, build, package, release, or generated IDE output may be staged or committed.
